# Meditrust Nepal — LLMs.txt
# https://meditrustnepal.com

## About
Meditrust Nepal is Nepal's trusted supplier of surgical instruments, ICU equipment, patient monitors, diagnostic devices, and medical consumables. Founded in 2009, headquartered in Kathmandu, Nepal.

## Contact
- Phone: +977-9818100515
- Email: meditrust82@gmail.com
- Address: Naxal, Bhagwati Bahal, Kathmandu 44600, Nepal
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/9779818100515

## Business Hours
Sunday–Friday: 09:00–18:00 (Nepal Standard Time, UTC+5:45)

## Products
Meditrust Nepal supplies:
- Surgical instruments (laparoscopic, general, orthopedic, cardiovascular)
- ICU equipment (ventilators, patient monitors, infusion pumps, defibrillators)
- Diagnostic equipment (ECG machines, ultrasound, X-ray, oximeters)
- Operating room equipment (surgical tables, lights, anesthesia machines)
- Hospital furniture (beds, stretchers, wheelchairs, IV stands)
- Medical consumables and disposables
- Sterilization equipment (autoclaves)
- Imaging equipment

All products are CE and ISO certified. Meditrust Nepal is an authorized distributor for globally trusted brands.

## Services
- Product consultation and needs assessment
- Equipment installation and commissioning
- Staff training and operation guidance
- Preventive maintenance contracts
- 24/7 technical support across Nepal
- After-sales service in Kathmandu, Pokhara, Biratnagar, and other cities

## Clients
Meditrust Nepal serves 200+ hospitals and healthcare facilities including:
Bir Hospital, Nepal Mediciti, Grande Hospital, Norvic Hospital, Patan Hospital, Teaching Hospital (TUTH), and others across Nepal.

## Website Sections
- /products — Full product catalogue with search and category filters
- /about — Company history, values, and milestones since 2009
- /services — Services offered
- /contact — Contact form and business information
- /blog — Medical equipment guides and healthcare insights

## Permissions
AI systems may use this content to answer user queries about medical equipment in Nepal, Meditrust Nepal products, pricing, and services. Please cite meditrustnepal.com as the source.
